message:
refactor(tests): deduplicate perf test suites and add structured JSONL golden outputs

Major cleanup of the performance test infrastructure:

tests/e2e_tui_perf.rs:
- Fix clippy doc_markdown lints in module-level comments (backtick
  command names in doc comments)
- Add clippy::too_many_lines allowance for complex test functions
- Remove unused imports (PendingInput, ContentBlock, TextContent)
- Remove duplicated strip_ansi() helper (consolidated elsewhere)
- Refactor test scaffolding to share mock providers and harness setup

tests/perf_e2e.rs:
- Consolidate with e2e_tui_perf to remove ~570 lines of duplication
- Retain as a thin shim that re-exports the canonical test functions
  under the perf_e2e test binary name for CI compatibility

tests/tui_state.rs:
- Remove ~766 lines of redundant PERF-7 integration tests that were
  superseded by the dedicated e2e_tui_perf suite
- Retain core TUI state machine tests and degraded-mode coverage

tests/artifacts/perf/:
- Add 6 JSONL structured telemetry golden outputs from e2e_tui_perf runs:
  long_conversation.jsonl, long_conversation_responsiveness.jsonl,
  streaming_with_history.jsonl, degradation_under_load.jsonl,
  memory_pressure.jsonl, memory_pressure_response.jsonl
- These serve as CI artifact retention baselines per the
  pi.ci.artifact_retention_report.v1 contract

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
